title: Georgie Porgy 3D Wooden Puzzles DIY Models Kits Age 8+ for Kids Dinosaur Airplane Woodcraft Construction Toys Pack of 6 (T-Rex Triceratops Spinosaurus Parasaurolophus Apatosaurus Stegosaurus)
features: 🎁Easy to assemble: no glues, no tools. With no difficulty, just insert one to another according to the serial numbers and instruction sheet. Done! An accessible DIY project for kids and adults.
🎁Material: Made of lightweight wood, durable and environment friendly.

🎁Fun and Educational Project: DIY activities help nurture a sense of achievement and pride in children, boosting their self-confidence. The opportunity to create whatever a child desires helps foster creativity.

🎁Gift Idea: A kid never has enough toys, and handmade ones make the best creative expression. You can give them this set of 3d wooden puzzles as children's day gifts, birthday gifts, Christmas gifts, etc.

🎁Suitable for children age 8 years old and up. Ideal for class project of primary school, family game, especially parent-child interaction, which promotes observation ability and hand-eye coordination, develop spacial awareness.
description: Product Description Georgie Porgy 3D Wooden Jigsaw Puzzle Wooden Model Kits for Kids What’s in the Package? Each wooden puzzle includes: 2 x wooden board, 1 x assemble sheet and 1 x small piece of sandpaper. Easy To Assemble 1. Insert one to another according to the same Serial numbers 2. Read the instruction carefully and continue to complete the assembly 3. Complete the assembly after all the serial numbers are assembled 4. If you want to paint, you can DIY your 3d wooden puzzle with painting tools (Note: this package does not include painting tools) 5. You DIY coloring wooden puzzle is done Features No glues and no tools Made of lightweight wood Durable and Safe Educational Toys Fun for Kids Perfect gift DIY Your Own 3D Wooden Puzzle Dinosaur Unicorn Airplane The Benefits of DIY Crafts for Kids Develop fine Motor skills Increases Dexterity Improves Hand-Eye Coordination Boost Self Esteem - kids are proud to say – I made it.
